title: Be Gone Leaf Clutter
description: Makes leaf litter only drop when using shears
body:

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/717952090b87cc70b748e5cae74c1bf10c6bdbf3.png)

# 📝Pack Explanation:

This is a very small datapack that fixes the clutter caused by leaf litter. Leaf litter now only dorps when using shears just like any other vines.

# 🖥️Installation:
### You basically have 2 options:
**Download the mod version:**\
You need any of the supported mod loaders for this:
  1. dowload the file
  2. put it in your mods folder
  3. If you're on a server, you have to put it in the server's mods folder too!

**Download the datapack version:**\
There is no need of any software, it runs on just vanilla and if you're on a server, your     players don't need to install it.
  1. download the datapack version
  2. put it in you datapacks folder of your world: ``saves/<your_world>/datapacks/<put_the_file_here>``
